measures.title: Evidence specification readiness
measures.questionAnswered: Has the evidence specification been completed in time for the first pack?
measures.measure: Completion of data specification, inventory, caveat register, taxonomy, comparator principles and responsible-use approach.
measures.target: Evidence specification and interpretation framework complete by September 2026.

measures.title: First evidence pack validation
measures.questionAnswered: Can selected users understand and use the first pack to interpret programme graduate futures evidence responsibly?
measures.measure: Testing findings covering clarity, credibility, responsible interpretation, caveats, usefulness and ability to support programme story.
measures.target: First evidence pack tested with selected users by September 2026.

measures.title: Programme pack sharing and learning from use
measures.questionAnswered: Have the first programme-facing packs been shared in a way that helps colleagues recognise strengths, ask useful questions and understand caveats?
measures.measure: Completion of programme-facing packs, short user guide, sharing route and captured learning from early use.
measures.target: Programme-facing packs shared and learning captured by Christmas 2026.

measures.title: Early institutional learning
measures.questionAnswered: Has early use of the packs created useful faculty and institutional learning without treating programme packs as final judgements?
measures.measure: Faculty conversations completed and early institutional summary submitted to the agreed senior education forum.
measures.target: Faculty conversations held and early institutional summary submitted by Christmas 2026.

measures.title: Early programme partner testing
measures.questionAnswered: Have early programme partners shown that the pack and guided conversation help surface programme value as well as areas for enhancement?
measures.measure: Early programme conversations and feedback on usability, credibility, framing, story value, actionability and outputs.
measures.target: Early programme partners complete meaningful tests before wider engagement.

measures.title: Programme story and responsible interpretation quality
measures.questionAnswered: Are colleagues using the evidence to tell accurate, context-sensitive programme stories and interpret caveats responsibly?
measures.measure: Review of early profiles, reflection templates, caveat use, facilitator feedback and programme confirmation of story material.
measures.cadence: During testing and programme engagement reviews
measures.target: Programme story material is evidence-linked, context-sensitive and agreed with programme teams.

measures.title: Shared prioritisation and focused engagement
measures.questionAnswered: Has the next phase reached agreed programme groups through a fair shared prioritisation process?
measures.measure: Agreed prioritisation criteria, completed supported conversations, reflections, practical actions and captured faculty learning.
measures.target: Agreed programme groups complete supported conversations by September 2027.

measures.title: Programme profile and action quality
measures.questionAnswered: Does the process help programmes produce credible graduate futures profiles and realistic actions?
measures.measure: Quality of Programme Graduate Futures Profiles, practical action sets, story material and identified support needs.
measures.target: Programmes engaged through supported review or self-review produce proportionate evidence-informed outputs.

measures.title: Living resource and institutional handoff
measures.questionAnswered: Has the evidence pack become a maintained resource connected to quality assurance and continual improvement?
measures.measure: Confirmed owner, refresh cadence, access route, interpretation guidance maintenance and quality assurance or continual improvement handoff.
measures.target: Living resource ownership and institutional handoff confirmed before full programme engagement completes.

measures.title: Full programme review or enabled self-review and synthesis
measures.questionAnswered: Has every agreed programme completed supported review or been enabled to self-review, and has institutional learning been synthesised?
measures.measure: Coverage confirmation, self-review enablement evidence and synthesis of strengths, recurring questions, support needs and implications.
measures.target: Every agreed programme has completed supported review or enabled self-review, with synthesis completed during 2027/28.
